data.title: demo: Workflows — hello world durable execution
data.description:
## Goal

Educational hello-world demo for Cloudflare Workflows (durable execution with retries and sleep).

## What to implement

* `HelloWorkflow` extending `WorkflowEntrypoint`
* Steps: fetch something, sleep 5s, write to D1
* `POST /start` spawns an instance
* `GET /status?id=` returns instance status
* `wrangler.jsonc` with Workflows binding

## Verify

```sh
curl -X POST https://<worker>.workers.dev/start -d '{"name":"world"}'
# returns { id: "...", status: "running" }
curl "https://<worker>.workers.dev/status?id=<id>"
```

## Repo

`skogai/cloudflare` — folder: `demos/workflows-hello`
